name: xf_cep_acc_updel_flush_win
drl: rule W when accumulate( E(tag == "x", $t : val) over window:time(100ms); $c : sum($t) ) then end
_finding: OPEN residual (D-155, pre-existing-class): the windowed twin of xf_cep_acc_updel_flush_plain — update-admits then same-epoch delete; the oracle fires the net-zero W:0 (per-entry flush), the engine's fire-boundary drain skips the dead fact (no fire). Same root: per-entry incremental execution. Contrast pr_cep_winacc_updel_inmember (already-in member: both sides fire).
